title: ER=EPR and the entanglement-geometry connection
statement: Maldacena and Susskind (2013) conjectured ER=EPR: that an Einstein-Rosen bridge (ER, a wormhole) is dual to quantum entanglement (EPR), so two entangled systems are connected by a (generally non-traversable) geometric bridge. More broadly, the conjecture suggests spacetime connectivity itself emerges from entanglement (Van Raamsdonk; Ryu-Takayanagi). A precise, general, and proven formulation — specifying exactly which entangled states correspond to which geometries, and in what regime — remains open.

ranking.rationale: Among the most generative recent ideas (it ties together holography, the information paradox and emergent spacetime), but it is a conjecture, not a theorem; ranked mid-list as deep-but-actively-developing.

key_ideas: An eternal AdS black hole is dual to two CFTs in the thermofield-double (maximally entangled) state, connected by a non-traversable wormhole (Maldacena 2001).
ER=EPR generalizes this: entanglement between any two systems is geometric connectivity.
Van Raamsdonk: disentangling boundary regions pinches off the bulk, so entanglement 'builds' spacetime.
Ryu-Takayanagi: entanglement entropy equals the area of a bulk minimal surface — area/entanglement again.
Traversable wormholes (Gao-Jafferis-Wall) realize controlled information transfer, sharpening ER=EPR.
Bears on the firewall (#06): identifying interior and exterior partners as the same wormhole endpoints can preserve a smooth horizon.

approaches.name: Holographic entanglement (Ryu-Takayanagi / QES)
approaches.summary: Geometrize entanglement entropy as minimal-surface area; quantum extremal surfaces extend it.

approaches.name: Emergent spacetime from entanglement
approaches.summary: Reconstruct bulk geometry/connectivity from boundary entanglement structure.

approaches.name: Traversable wormholes
approaches.summary: Engineer entanglement (a double-trace coupling) to make the bridge traversable, testing ER=EPR operationally.

papers.title: The Large-N Limit of Superconformal Field Theories and Supergravity
papers.note: The original AdS/CFT correspondence; foundation of holographic duality on which the entire entanglement-geometry program rests. Adv. Theor. Math. Phys. 2 (1998) 231.

papers.title: Eternal black holes in anti-de Sitter
papers.note: Establishes that the eternal two-sided AdS black hole is dual to two CFTs in the thermofield double state — the direct precursor to entanglement=geometry and ER=EPR. JHEP 0304 (2003) 021. Bibliographic note (canonical classic).

papers.title: Holographic derivation of entanglement entropy from the anti-de Sitter space/conformal field theory correspondence
papers.note: The Ryu-Takayanagi formula: entanglement entropy of a boundary region equals area/4G of a bulk minimal surface. Phys. Rev. Lett. 96, 181602.

papers.title: Aspects of Holographic Entanglement Entropy
papers.note: Extended companion to the RT Letter with the AdS3/CFT2 derivation and higher-dimensional discussion. JHEP 0608 (2006) 045.

papers.title: A covariant holographic entanglement entropy proposal
papers.note: The HRT formula — covariant (time-dependent) generalization of Ryu-Takayanagi via extremal surfaces. JHEP 0707 (2007) 062.

papers.title: Building up spacetime with quantum entanglement
papers.note: The 'entanglement = geometry' essay: classical spacetime connectivity emerges from entanglement of boundary degrees of freedom. Gen. Rel. Grav. 42 (2010) 2323.

papers.title: Cool horizons for entangled black holes
papers.note: The ER=EPR conjecture: Einstein-Rosen bridges are dual to EPR entanglement; proposed resolution of firewall paradoxes. Fortsch. Phys. 61 (2013) 781.

papers.title: Gravitation from entanglement in holographic CFTs
papers.note: Linearized Einstein equations derived from the entanglement first law for all ball-shaped regions. JHEP 1403 (2014) 051.

papers.title: Universality of Gravity from Entanglement
papers.note: 1/N correction to the entanglement first law yields the gravitational source term (Newton's law), arguing entanglement universally sources gravity.

papers.title: Quantum extremal surfaces: holographic entanglement entropy beyond the classical regime
papers.note: Quantum extremal surface prescription: extremize generalized entropy (area + bulk entanglement). JHEP 1501 (2015) 073. Key tool for islands.

papers.title: Holographic quantum error-correcting codes: toy models for the bulk/boundary correspondence
papers.note: HaPPY code: exactly solvable tensor-network toy models realizing RT and bulk reconstruction as quantum error correction. JHEP 1506 (2015) 149.

papers.title: Bidirectional holographic codes and sub-AdS locality
papers.note: Tensor-network holographic codes extending HaPPY with bulk gauge symmetry and emergent sub-AdS locality. JHEP 1601 (2016) 175.

papers.title: Deriving covariant holographic entanglement
papers.note: Gravitational replica/Schwinger-Keldysh derivation of the covariant (HRT) holographic entanglement entropy proposal. JHEP 1611 (2016) 028.

papers.title: Traversable wormholes via a double trace deformation
papers.note: GJW: coupling the two boundaries of an eternal BTZ black hole produces negative null energy that makes the Einstein-Rosen bridge traversable; ties ER=EPR to teleportation. JHEP 1712 (2017) 151.

papers.title: Entanglement Wedge Reconstruction via Universal Recovery Channels
papers.note: Robust proof of entanglement-wedge reconstruction using universal (Petz/twirled) recovery channels. Phys. Rev. X 9, 031011.

papers.title: Spacetime from Entanglement
papers.note: Colloquium-style review of emergent spacetime/gravity from entanglement and tensor networks. Annu. Rev. Condens. Matter Phys. 9 (2018) 345.

papers.title: Eternal traversable wormhole
papers.note: Nearly-AdS2 eternal traversable wormhole dual to two coupled SYK models; central to the SYK-wormhole correspondence.

papers.title: Quantum chaos transition in a two-site Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev model dual to an eternal traversable wormhole
papers.note: Spectral/eigenstate analysis of the coupled two-site SYK model dual to the Maldacena-Qi eternal traversable wormhole. Phys. Rev. D 100, 026002.

papers.title: Entanglement wedge reconstruction using the Petz map
papers.note: Shows the (untwirled) Petz map suffices for entanglement-wedge reconstruction with non-perturbatively small error. JHEP 2001 (2020) 168.

papers.title: Replica wormholes and the entropy of Hawking radiation
papers.note: Replica wormholes in the gravitational path integral produce the island rule and the unitary Page curve for Hawking radiation. JHEP 2005 (2020) 013.

papers.title: Leading order corrections to the quantum extremal surface prescription
papers.note: Refines the QES/entanglement-wedge prescription using one-shot (min/max) entropies and connects it to quantum state merging. JHEP 2104 (2021) 062.

papers.title: Quantum Gravity in the Lab. I. Teleportation by Size and Traversable Wormholes
papers.note: Teleportation-by-size / size-winding proposal connecting operator growth to traversable-wormhole teleportation, with table-top implementation ideas. PRX Quantum 4, 010320.

papers.title: Traversable wormhole dynamics on a quantum processor
papers.note: Sparsified SYK teleportation circuit run on Google's Sycamore processor, observing traversable-wormhole-like dynamics. Nature 612, 51 (2022). (See critical comments by Kobrin et al. arXiv:2302.07897.)

papers.title: Probing the Connection between Entangled Particles and Wormholes in General Relativity
papers.note: Concrete quantitative ER=EPR model: two spin-1/2 Dirac fermions in a singlet connected by a non-traversable wormhole, evolved numerically in asymptotically-flat GR. Phys. Rev. Lett. (2023).

physicists.name: Juan Maldacena
physicists.contribution: Discovered AdS/CFT (1997), the eternal-black-hole/thermofield-double duality (2001), and co-proposed ER=EPR (2013) and the eternal traversable wormhole (2018).

physicists.name: Leonard Susskind
physicists.contribution: Co-originator of ER=EPR (with Maldacena, 2013); holographic principle, black-hole complementarity, and complexity=volume programs.

physicists.name: Shinsei Ryu
physicists.contribution: Co-derived the Ryu-Takayanagi formula relating entanglement entropy to bulk minimal-surface area.

physicists.name: Tadashi Takayanagi
physicists.affiliation: Yukawa Institute for Theoretical Physics, Kyoto University
physicists.contribution: Co-derived the Ryu-Takayanagi formula and co-proposed the covariant (HRT) generalization.

physicists.name: Mark Van Raamsdonk
physicists.contribution: Articulated 'entanglement = geometry' (spacetime built from entanglement) and co-derived Einstein's equations from the entanglement first law.

physicists.name: Thomas Faulkner
physicists.contribution: Led the derivation of linearized Einstein equations from entanglement (Faulkner-Guica-Hartman-Myers-Van Raamsdonk) and FLM quantum corrections to RT.

physicists.name: Netta Engelhardt
physicists.contribution: Co-introduced the quantum extremal surface prescription (with Aron Wall), the basis for island computations of the Page curve.

physicists.name: Geoff Penington
physicists.contribution: Pioneered the island/quantum-extremal-surface resolution of the information paradox and Petz-map entanglement-wedge reconstruction.

physicists.name: Daniel Louis Jafferis
physicists.contribution: Co-constructed the double-trace traversable wormhole (GJW) and led the Sycamore quantum-processor wormhole-dynamics experiment.

physicists.name: Brian Swingle
physicists.contribution: Connected tensor networks (MERA) to holographic geometry and emergent spacetime, and co-developed teleportation-by-size for lab wormholes.

simulator_angle: The eternal-black-hole (maximally-extended Kerr/Schwarzschild) geometry with its Einstein-Rosen bridge is a renderable spacetime; the simulator's metric machinery could visualize the two-sided geometry, while the entanglement duality is conceptual.

metadata.coverage_note: Assembled 24 verified, genuinely-relevant papers and 10 physicists for the ER=EPR / entanglement-geometry problem. Method: ran ~11 Consensus paper-search MCP queries spanning foundational landmarks (AdS/CFT, Ryu-Takayanagi, ER=EPR, entanglement=geometry), reviews, and recent results (replica wormholes/islands, quantum extremal surfaces, traversable wormholes, SYK, lab teleportation, holographic codes). 22 papers carry the exact Consensus result URL returned by search; 2 are canonical landmarks given with bibliographic notes (Maldacena 2001 'Eternal black holes in AdS', and arXiv ids added to the search-found Maldacena 1997 and others where certain). No titles, authors, years, or identifiers were invented; where a result's journal was 'Unknown Journal' in search I left it unstated. This is an OPEN problem, so most resolution-level entries are labeled open_conjecture or speculative_extension; the exact two-sided AdS-Schwarzschild/BTZ geometry and the FGMRV derivation are analytic_classical; the Google Sycamore experiment is observational_constraint. I stopped at 24 rather than padding to 25.
